title: Kestrel 0.6 Live Runtime
description: Public runtime behavior scenarios executed by Ruhroh through the maintained Kestrel adapter.

methodology.retryPolicy: Retry only documented provider or evaluation infrastructure failures; do not retry agent or outcome failures inside a sample.

changelog: 0.2.0: Added conflicting-evidence synthesis as an evaluator-owned Ruhroh scenario.
0.1.0: Initial declarative migration of seven live evaluator cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Kestrel reaches the requested terminal outcome through the public job contract.
Ruhroh preserves Kestrel run, thread, replay, event-log, and job-output evidence.
Tool use, degraded-provider behavior, and user-visible caveats satisfy each scenario rubric.
governance.contaminationReview: Prompts originate from Kestrel's pre-existing live canary cases and contain no hidden solution artifacts.
governance.rewardHackingReview: Reviewers must inspect Kestrel job and event evidence; output phrase matching alone cannot pass a scenario.
reviewChecklist: Confirm the Kestrel adapter reports native_session continuity.
Confirm expected tool calls appear in the preserved event log.
Confirm provider degradation is surfaced rather than hidden.
Confirm no in-repository evaluator implementation is used during execution.
governance.deprecationPolicy: Bump suiteVersion whenever membership, prompts, scenario versions, or acceptance evidence changes.
